subcodes.first_line: A span of time hath passed, and the covenants have been fulfilled, yet no bird hath taken flight from yonder realm, bearing tidings to the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مدتها درگذشت و عهدها تمام شد و طیری از آن جانب پرواز ننمود و خبری بدوستان
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
